chunk_id: docling_book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092_15
text: This method, known as the RSA cryptosystem, is called a public key cryptosystem, since the encryption key is made available to everyone, and the encrypted message can be transmitted through public channels. Only the possessor of the prime factors of m can decrypt the message. RSA is simple, but useful, and is the basis of many commercially valuable cryptosystems.
page: book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092

chunk_id: docling_book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092_17
text: Consider the secret key cryptosystem constructed from the prime p = 947 and the encoding key e = 167. Encipher the plaintext P = 2. Find a decrypting key and decipher the ciphertext C = 3.
page: book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092

chunk_id: docling_book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092_18
text: Consider the primes p = 53 and q = 61. Let m = pq. Prove that e = 7 is relatively prime to p(m). Find a positive integer d such that ed = 1 (mod 4(m)).
page: book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092

chunk_id: docling_book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092_19
text: The integer 6059 is the product of two distinct primes, and 4(6059) = 5904. Use Theorem 2.19 to compute the prime divisors of 6059.
page: book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092

chunk_id: docling_book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092_20
text: The probability that an integer chosen at random between 1 and n is relatively prime to n is 4(n) /n. Let n = pq, where p and q are distinct primes greater than x. Prove that the probability that a randomly chosen positive integer up to x is relatively prime to n is greater than (1 - 1/x). If x = 200, this probability is greater than 0.99.
page: book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0092
